channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [剧场版][开播][公开] Anime News Network Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls 公开 Phoenix Cyclops DLC, 开播 Movie Animated by Studio Sanzigen
item.description: Ray Chase voices Phoenix Cyclops, who arrives as 1st DLC character this fall ― The San Diego Comic Con panel for PlayStation Studios, Arc System Works, and Marvel Games' Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls Reveals Phoenix Cyclops DLC, Opening Movie Animated by Studio Sanzigen

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network One Piece TV Anime的 Elbaph Arc Debuts English Dub Fall
item.description: Crunchyroll to stream dub in U.S., Canada, Australia, New Zealand, South Africa ― Crunchyroll announced on Thursday that it will begin streaming the English dub for the One Piece anime's Elbaph arc... | 来源: ANN | 原文: One Piece TV Anime's Elbaph Arc Debuts English Dub in Fall

item.title: [CAST] MyAnimeList 追加 声优阵容 Pair Junket Bank Announced
item.description: The official website of the television anime adaptation of Ikkou Tanaka's Junket Bank manga announced an additional pair of cast on Wednesday. The anime is scheduled to premiere on TV Tokyo... | 来源: MAL | 原文: Additional Cast Pair for 'Junket Bank' Announced
